name: Avatar
description: Visual representation of a user or entity

name.description: Full name - used to generate initials

customSize.description: Custom avatar size (number in px or CSS size string like "2.25rem"), overrides size width/height

color.description: Custom background color for fallback avatar

imageStyle.description: Inline style object applied to the underlying image element

imageProps.description: Additional props for the underlying img element (except src/alt/className/style)

when: Representing entities in lists or cards
User identification in comments or messages
guidelines: Always provide alt text or name for accessibility
Use consistent sizes within the same context
Provide fallback initials when image may not load
Use Avatar.Group for multiple avatars in a row
Use imageProps for advanced img attributes (loading, decoding, referrerPolicy, etc.)
accessibility: Include meaningful alt text describing the user
Initials should be derived from name for screen readers
Decorative avatars should have empty alt

examples.name: Default
examples.code:
import { Avatar } from '@/components/Avatar';

<Avatar
  src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=jane"
  alt="Jane Doe"
  name="Jane Doe"
/>

examples.name: With Initials
examples.description: Fallback when no image is provided

examples.name: Sizes
examples.code:
import { Avatar } from '@/components/Avatar';
import { Stack } from '@/components/Stack';

<Stack direction="row" gap="sm" align="center" wrap>
  <Avatar name="XS" size="xs" />
  <Avatar name="SM" size="sm" />
  <Avatar name="MD" size="md" />
  <Avatar name="LG" size="lg" />
  <Avatar name="XL" size="xl" />
</Stack>

examples.name: Custom Size
examples.code:
import { Avatar } from '@/components/Avatar';

<Avatar name="Conan McNicholl" customSize={36} />

examples.name: Square Shape
examples.description: Square variant for app icons or brands

examples.name: Group
examples.code:
import { Avatar } from '@/components/Avatar';

<Avatar.Group max={3} size="md">
  <Avatar name="Alice Johnson" />
  <Avatar name="Bob Smith" />
  <Avatar name="Carol Williams" />
  <Avatar name="David Brown" />
  <Avatar name="Eve Davis" />
</Avatar.Group>

relations.note: Use Avatar.Group for stacked avatar displays

propsSummary: name: string - used for initials fallback
